summary: Comprehensive verification of blockchain.com wallet clone - ALL 16 features tested and PASSED
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created with unique UUIDs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 features verified and working correctly. Backend API tests: 15/15 passed. Frontend UI tests: All features verified via Playwright.

verified_features.1_landing_page: PASS - Landing page loads with EN/IT language toggle visible
verified_features.2_admin_login: PASS - Admin login with admin@blockchain.com/admin123 redirects to /admin
verified_features.3_admin_dashboard: PASS - Admin dashboard loads with stats (total users, active users)
verified_features.4_admin_users: PASS - Admin users page shows 'Registered' column with registration dates
verified_features.5_admin_edit_user: PASS - Admin edit user shows password field with eye toggle and DOB field
verified_features.6_admin_transactions: PASS - Admin transactions shows 'Date & Time' and 'User' columns with name/email
verified_features.7_user_registration: PASS - User registration flow works, redirects to wallet dashboard
verified_features.8_user_login: PASS - User login with registered user works correctly
verified_features.9_wallet_dashboard: PASS - Wallet dashboard shows USDC/EUR exchange rate (≈€0.00 conversion and 0.23% Past 24hr)
verified_features.10_exchange_rate_api: PASS - GET /api/exchange-rate returns valid data (usdc_eur, eur_usdc, change_24h_pct)
verified_features.11_sliding_session: PASS - X-Refreshed-Token header returned on authenticated API calls
verified_features.12_kyc_page: PASS - KYC multi-step form loads with 3 steps and document type selection (Passport/ID Card/Driver's License)
verified_features.13_profile_page: PASS - Profile page loads with Identity Verification and Personal Information sections
verified_features.14_transactions_page: PASS - User transactions page loads with filter tabs (All/Deposits/Receives/Sends/Swaps)
verified_features.15_language_toggle: PASS - Language toggle switches between EN and IT on landing page and inside wallet

test_execution_details.exchange_rate_value: 1 USDC = 0.860652 EUR (live ECB data via Frankfurter API)
